---
title: "Bureau"
body-classes: bureau
---

```{r}
source(here::here("_resources", "scripts", "helpers.R"))

bureau_card <- \(photo, nom, fonction, desc) {
  nom_nbsp <- stringr::str_replace_all(nom, "\\s", "&nbsp;")
  glue_qmd("
  ::: {.bureau-card}
  <img src='<<photo>>' alt='<<nom>>' class='bureau-photo'>
  <div class='bureau-info'>
    <h2 class='bureau-nom'><<nom_nbsp>></h2>
    <p class='bureau-fonction'><<fonction>></p>
    <p class='bureau-desc'><<desc>></p>
  </div>
  :::
  ")
}
```

:::: {.column-screen}

# Qui sommes-nous ?

::: {.bureau-grid}

```{r}
#| output: asis
yaml12::read_yaml(here::here("_resources", "bureau.yml"))$bureau |>
  purrr::map_chr(~ bureau_card(.$photo, .$nom, .$fonction, .$desc)) |>
  cat(sep = "\n\n")
```

:::

::: {.page-content}

::: {.column width="40%"}
# Maison Régionale de la Recherche Clinique, CHU de Lille
<iframe 
  src="{{< var links.map >}}" 
  title="Carte de localisation du bureau de l'ALiSP"
  width="100%"
  height="600"
  sandbox="allow-scripts"
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>
:::

::: {.column width="60%" class="embed-container"}
::: callout-important
# attente autorisation trombi
:::
<iframe src="{{< var docs.trombi >}}"></iframe>
:::

:::

::::
